mapper.select: select concat('订单号:',c.s_no) as enevt,date_format(d.add_time,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as time,d.commission as moeny ,case when c.status=101 then '待发放' else '已发放' end as status ,c.status as type from lkt_living_commission c left join lkt_order_details d on c.s_no = d.r_sNo where c.store_id=#{store_id} and c.recycle=0 and c.user_id=#{user_id} union all select event,date_format(add_date,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as time,money,'已完成' as status,102 as type from lkt_record where store_id=#{store_id} and user_id=#{user_id} and type=42 order by time desc LIMIT #{page},#{pageSize}

select sum(a.num) from ( select count(1) as num from lkt_living_commission c left join lkt_order_details d on c.s_no = d.r_sNo where c.store_id=#{store_id} and c.recycle=0 and c.user_id=#{user_id} union all select count(1) as num from lkt_record where store_id=#{store_id} and user_id=#{user_id} and type=42) a
